Appearances:
Plaintiff Zack Khoury is present. Represented by Billy Chan.
Attorney Michael McLaughlin appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Twenty Two Holding present.
Attorney Bryan Kreft and Berette Shaffer are representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, the litigants and counsel confer in Dept.501A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of February 24, 2020 was continued to March 09, 2020 per order filed in 580955.
